evaluations.summary: The role package assigns authority to local reference docs and defines review/freeze semantics locally instead of naming shared governing sources in precedence order and deriving only local consequences.
evaluations.evidence_location: Artifact markdown <authority>; Artifact markdown <guardrails>; Artifact contract JSON governance
evaluations.why_it_matters: ARB-017 requires inherited governance to point to the exact shared governing sources in precedence order, with the role package limited to component-local consequences. Here, the authority section elevates reference docs without establishing a governing-source order, and the role/package contract restates freeze/arbitration behavior locally through fields such as max_review_rounds, allow_single_arbitration_round, and freeze_requires_no_material_pushback. That creates governance ambiguity and risks local semantics drifting from the live shared contract.
